reasons: Task ID structure defined with validation regex: {wave_prefix}-{sequence:02d}-{date}-{index:02d}
Wave order defined: Three-wave structure (WAVE_1 → WAVE_2 → WAVE_3) with dependencies
Archive targets specified: 4 required artifacts (MANIFEST, BOARD_FREEZE, final_gate, snapshot_dir)
Aggregation path defined: 5-step process with script references
Three-tier role separation enforced: Execution → Review → Compliance, with cannot_approve flag
Review and compliance location constraint specified: LOCAL-ANTIGRAVITY only
All deliverables created: template, execution_report, completion_record
All claims supported by EvidenceRef with file paths and line numbers
No stability claims made without evidence (template is definition, not execution)
Template structure verified against reference implementations (L4-n8n)
Remaining risks documented with mitigation strategies

evidence_refs.description: Task ID schema with pattern and validation
Wave order with sequential dependencies and signoff
Execution report with deliverables and key results
Completion record using compliant template v1.0
Reference MANIFEST.json structure used for validation
Reference final_gate_decision.json structure used for validation

task_ids_wave_order_archive_targets_defi.check: Template defines task IDs, wave order, and archive targets

no_self_approval_path.check: Template enforces three-tier separation with cannot_approve flag

final_aggregation_path_explicit.check: Aggregation path is defined with 5 explicit steps

template_executable.check: Template has clear structure with references to existing implementations

closed_loop_complete.check: Contract → Receipt → Gate chain is complete

no_unproven_stability_claims.evidence: Template is definition only; all claims have EvidenceRef

no_permit_gate_bypass.check: Template enforces review/compliance local to LOCAL-ANTIGRAVITY

time_window_compliant.check: Task completed within dispatch execution window

artifact_integrity.check: All required artifacts present: template, execution_report, completion_record

risk_t3c_001.description: Template not validated against actual cloud batch execution
risk_t3c_001.mitigation: Smoke batch test before full production use

risk_t3c_002.mitigation: Scripts exist; validation required before first batch

risk_t3c_003.mitigation: Template defines signoff roles; operational runbook needed

risk_t3c_004.description: No automated enforcement of three-tier separation
risk_t3c_004.mitigation: Template defines cannot_approve; gate review verifies separation

exit_clearance.message: T3-C batch template design task complete. All deliverables created and verified. Template ready for use in M2/M3/M4 batch dispatch.
next_steps: Optional: Run smoke batch (M2-01) to validate template structure
Optional: Update aggregation scripts if needed for new template
Template is ready for production use when cloud batch execution is authorized

notes: T3-C completed successfully. Template is well-structured with clear references to existing evidence patterns. No self-approval paths exist. Review and compliance remain local as required. Remaining risks are documented and mitigated.
